prompt: Update stale US-105 Phase 4 status text, keep Phase 5 candidate-only, and prove Phase 6 did not start.

commands.observation: The initiative overview identifies accepted Phases 1-4 and candidate-only Phase 5.
The validation packet keeps Phase 6 closed.
The ordinary documentation change is whitespace-clean.

cause_effect: AGENTS.md routes the task to the existing story and test matrix, so no duplicate map or cosmetic path move is needed.
The target-native rg and Git checks prove the requested documentation state, so no install, update, audit, scaffold, status, or version core command enters ordinary work.
